svg.title: RetailBench net worth trajectory
svg.desc: Line chart showing Oracle Policy and selected LLM net worth trajectories over the 180-day RetailBench horizon.
svg.text: Net worth trajectory over the 180-day horizon
Oracle Policy separates sharply from selected LLM runs after the initial operating period.
Dashed segments carry stopped LLM runs forward at terminal net worth for direct comparison with the 180-day horizon.
